entry.title: Cancel operation activity in SAP DMC
entry.content:
Hello experts. Is there a way to cancel operation activity on SAP DMC?

Thanks.

entry.title: Time Smoothing
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I have a requirement from our client.
Background: A group of employees work on a 14days work schedule - In a month, they work 12hrs for 14days and do not work for the next 14days.
The time recording calendar is set to submit timesheets biweekly.
Currently, for these set of employees only 4days(48hrs) of work gets completed before the timesheet is submitted for the first pay period and 10days(120hrs) gets submitted with the next pay period.
Example: James worked on the 14day schedule. see the below table

Period Start DatePeriod End DateSubmission DatePay Date  EEWS Start DateWS End DateMid WeekCurrent State Submission Date
12/05/2024  25/05/202427/05/2024  30/05/2024 James22/05/202404/06/202428/05/20244days(48hrs) - 27th
26/05/2024  08/06/2024  10/06/2024  13/06/2024     10days (120hrs)- 10th

Requirement: Is it possible to send the first 7days(84hrs) to payroll for the first pay period and the remaining 7days(84hrs) sent in the next pay period.
Note that for the first 7days, 3days(from example 26 - 28) is after the first pay period end date.
Also, is it possible to send all OT recorded in the 14days to payroll with the first pay period.
Thanks
SAP Timesheet SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking HCM Time Management SAP Payroll and Time Change Management

entry.title: Process Automation Desktop Agent for MAC
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm trying to activate the tenant in my Desktop Agent for MAC but I'm facing an error when i login in to activate my tenant:

{
  "error": {
    "status": 403,
    "code": "SAP_IPA_05120",
    "severity": "error",
    "message": "Fail to create a registration token",
    "correlationId": "ce22161e-1183-404c-7b40-327453839ac7"
  }
}

I found the KBA Note 3401479, that fix this error, but it is only for windows. 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3401479/E

Some of you guys already had this same problems and can help me, please?
 SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: Re: Tax information CDS view
entry.content:
Hi there , I am looking for the Tax data CDS view as well, above Table/view I_TaxBalancesGrp doesn't exist, however, I_TaxBaseBalancesGroup is neither accessible, or, having no data in it. Any other alternate table, available?

I know in ECC or prior R3 Releases, we can use the following

T007S ---> Tax Code Names

T007A ---> Tax Keys

T007C ---> Groupings for tax codes

IDCFMBRSETX_HST ---> History table for taxation

Looking for corresponding table/CDS views in Public Cloud. 

Thanks for any expert's advice. Siva

entry.title: Set custom limit on API call for Export to Excel in ListReport template.
entry.content:
We are experiencing gateway time outs while utilizing the export button from the Fiori Elements List Report. This is due to Export Request Size dynamically considering 5000 records for each call based on data volume, such as in a customer environment with 200,000 users. Processing 5000 records for each service call takes more than 30 seconds, causing the gateway timeout. 
We're attempting to set the exportRequestSize to 3000 in the manifest.json, but it is not being considered. Please let us know how to modify the exportRequestSize.

 

Here is the code we customized:

 

 

We can have call if you need more information.

 

Here is the UI screenshot for export icon that we are using.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Does an MRP run delete or cancel planned orders if the min/max are set to 0.
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

We are working on MM deletions. One of the checks is to ensure there are no orders, including planned orders (STPOs). Currently, there are STPOs for every material I want to delete.

The other conditions are as follows:

  1. No stock on hand of any kind, and
  2. No demand (reservations, work orders etc)

Is an MRP-run expected to or able to rid the system of the planned orders (STPOs)?

Thank you for your input.

Kind Regards,

PM

entry.title: How to view the answers in a quiz?
entry.content:
Hello
I have a quiz assigned to a student and I want to see the answers he gives each time he takes this quiz.
Is it possible to see it in a report or in some way?
I am connected to my manager

entry.title: Re: Send mail service not working
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

The mail is sitting at the mailtrap inbox, is this the expected behaviour.

entry.title: Re: inventory counting SQL query with counted batch qty
entry.content:
Hi,

Try to replace 

inner join INC3 t6 on t5.ItemCode=t6.ItemCode

by

left join INC3 t6 on t5.ItemCode=t6.ItemCode

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Determine Tax Code in Purchase Documents using Condition Technique
entry.content:
Very useful and informative write-up. Thanks a lot. 

I would like to check BTW, how to access tax data relevant CDS views like we used to refer to tax condition record and go back to tax procedures and tax categories in the back end e.g. ECC / R3 earlier release Tables like T007, T007A, T007C etc. 

In S4H Public Cloud, I find few CDS Views like I_TaxBalanceGrop, I_TaxBaseBalancesGroup etc, but they are not accessible as a frontend. Another table / view I_OperationalAcctgDocTaxItem - almost has all relevant Data that we see in BSET except the Tax Rate.  

Is there any better way to fetch tax data like Tax Code, Tax Category, Tax Rate and various Tax amounts in a single point of source? 

Any help is much appreciated 

Thanks, Sivasankaran

entry.title: Re: Manual Princing Condition not copied using BAPI
entry.content: SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE does not support "Create with reference" function. You can find the details from the note 3197522 and 550726

entry.title: Material stuck in storage location due to HU missing
entry.content:
Dear colleagues, need your help and inputs on this problem:

By request from our customer to clean up inventory differences betw IM/WM, a configuration was done to use LX23; config was about to change plant HU management (LogGen- HU management- Basics- Mat Managmt- Inv Mgmt - HU Req for sloc and default values) causing that a batch was generated without HU's. After configuration was reversed, the batch cannot be moved/changed since sloc is looking for HU.

We're trying to move batch without reverse again configuration, ¿is there any way to do it manually? or to adjust batch thru inventory document?

Problem is: delivery created with batch assigned was deleted, but in LQUA table still appears assigned as storage bin.

Thanks for your help!

Regards,

Myriam Garcia

entry.title: Re: VI01 - Item not created because service agent AG not...
entry.content: shipment cost with ref to item yet not calculated item not created as service agent y1 not in the reference document in sap for shippment cost

entry.title: Re: inventory counting SQL query with counted batch qty
entry.content: Hi @SonTran , the results still the same even I changed it to left join

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Empowering Your Homepage: Enabling My Home for SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS0
entry.content:
Hi @jvanattenhoven,

As mentioned in the blog title, The My Home page capability is only available from SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 for both On-Prem and Private Cloud Edition. Please ensure that you have at least the Software Component Version SAP_UI 758 SP01 (Product Version: SAP FIORI FES FOR S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 (02/2024)) Installed on your system. If this prerequisite is met, the UI5_INSIGHTS = true should work.

In the official help doc: Launchpad Configuration Parameters | SAP Help Portal you can see a note that indicates that the description might not be fully updated (please refer to the image below). But it should work as intended.

entry.title: Consuming SAP with SAP Build Apps - adding S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
This blog post is the fifth in a series of posts that cover the connectivity options available for SAP Build Apps to interface with SAP systems. The series will cover connecting SAP Build Apps with the following:

  1. CAP-based services
  2. S/4HANA systems
  3. ABAP systems

The format of this post is similar to a tutorial. However, I'll provide more comprehensive details, tips and the opportunity for you to provide feedback. Based on the feedback we will be able to adjust and enhance this post and future parts of the series, and might even be able to improve the products involved as well. 

Introduction 

Before we get into the details of setting up connections between SAP Build Apps and SAP Systems, I intend to introduce a couple of SAP technology components in each post that are relevant for the use cases covered in the series. 

SAP Business Accelerator Hub

SAP Business Accelerator Hub is a web application hosted by SAP to help discover, explore, and test SAP and partner APIs (application programming interfaces) that are required to build extensions or process integrations. It also hosts Integration content, Events, CDS views, and more.

In the context of this blog post, SAP Business Accelerator Hub offers us an easy way to find and explore APIs available on S/4HANA Cloud, which can be used in our application.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is a ready-to-run cloud-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) system that provides business application solutions and industry best practices. It's a software as a service (SaaS) solution that's flexible, scalable, and easy to use, making it suitable for businesses of all sizes and industries. It offers an efficient, agile, and affordable solution for connecting your workforce, suppliers, customers, markets, and assets without adding complexity. With preconfigured end-to-end processes and innovative data management solutions, you can build your own breakthroughs, reshape business models, and redefine work on the fly.

Although this ERP system is using a SAP HANA Cloud database for storing information, it should be clear that it is offering more than just a database.

Use case E : Consume data from an SAP S/4HANA Cloud system in our SAP Build Apps application

For this use case, we will extend the application previously created in SAP Build Apps with additional screens where we show information retrieved from an S/4 HANA Cloud system. 

Solution diagram

Like in the previous blog post, we will start with a quick look into what needs to change in our solution overview to retrieve information from a cloud-based ERP system. I have added Business Accelerator Hub to the diagram as it helps to discover, explore and try out the APIs available in SAP systems. After identifying the required APIs, we create BTP destinations that can be used in our design time environments, as well as in our apps. These destinations form a bridge to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud ERP system we have added. 


The end result (web app)

Before we get into the details, let's take a look at what functionality we will be adding the our application.


Using SAP Business Accelerator Hub to identify the APIs we need

Let's explore which APIs we can use in our application by using SAP Business Accelerator Hub. Open api.sap.com and log in.

Choose the product SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Select the APIs tab and select ODATA V2. Search for "business partner".

Select the Business Partner (A2X) tile to view various details of the API. You can view the API reference and even try out the API. In API Resources, you'll find a few items relevant for our use case:

  1. Configuration Details - copy the sandbox url. This url points to the OData service endpoint on a sandbox S/4HANA Cloud system that exposes the API called API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.

  2. Authentication Methods - Shows which authentication methods are supported by this API.

     

  3. In the top right corner there is a button called "Show API Key". Use this to obtain the key that provides you access to the API.

 

Besides the Business Partner entity, we are also going to use the Purchase Order entity provided by the S/4HANA Cloud system as OData V4 source.

In SAP Business Accelerator Hub, choose the product SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Select the APIs tab and select ODATA V4 and search for "purchase order".

Select the Purchase Order tile to view various details of the API. You can view the API reference and even try out the API. In API Resources, you'll find a few items relevant for our use case:

  1. Configuration Details - copy the sandbox url. This url points to the OData service endpoint on the sandbox S/4HANA Cloud system that exposes the API called API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.



  2. Authentication Methods - Shows which authentication methods are supported by this API.

 

Creating a Destination to access data from S/4HANA Cloud

In the BTP Cockpit of your subaccount, please navigate to Connectivity > Destinations and select Create Destination.

Provide a name that makes it clear what the source is and what data it exposes. For the URL, please use the sandbox URL we've found in the configuration details in SAP Business Accelerator Hub. For the authentication, we will select NoAuthentication. This doesn't mean everyone has access to the data sources exposed by this S/4HANA sandbox system. Users need an API key to get access. This API key is to be stored in the Additional Properties of the Destination Configuration. 

The additional properties to configure are:

PropertyDescriptionValue
AppgyverEnabledDestination can be used in SAP Build Appstrue
HTML5.DynamicDestination

This enables the managed application router to dynamically adjust the destination based on the incoming request’s host or path information. This is beneficial for scenarios where the destination URL may change or need to be determined at runtime. 

Link to Work Zone documentation.

true
MobileEnabledDestination can be discovered in SAP Mobile Services and is accessible for mobile applications.true
URL.headers.APIKeyThis adds the API key for accessing the S/4HANA Cloud APIs in the header of HTTP requests.API key copied from SAP Business Accelerator Hub
WebIDEEnabledDestination can be discovered in SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Code, SAP Business Application Studio, SAP Web IDEtrue

 

With the above information, we create a BTP Destination for accessing Business Partner.

Similarly, we create a BTP Destination for accessing Purchase Order.

Adding the data sources in SAP Build Apps

Going back to SAP Build Apps, we navigate to the DATA tab and select ADD INTEGRATION, followed by BTP DESTINATIONS. You should now be able to select the newly added destinations.

Business Partner

Select the Business Partner data source. You will notice that this data source contains several data entities. For each of them, you can browse real data coming from the S/4HANA Cloud sandbox system. For our app, we are going to show a list of suppliers. Take note that at this point, there is no relationship between the products entity we have created earlier. We will cover this in an upcoming blog post.

Search for 'supplier' and select the data entity A_Supplier. Select ENABLE DATA ENTITY to use this particular data entity in your app. All other data entities in the data service are not relevant and will be ignored in our app. Notice that data entities contain several fields, also referred to as properties. Not all these fields are used in the sandbox system.

You can browse the data stored in the S/4HANA Cloud system by selecting the BROWSE REAL DATA button. The can help you in deciding which field to use in your UI application.

Purchase Order

Go back to the DATA > SAP Systems and add another integration for Purchase Order, which is exposed as an OData V4 service. For this blog post, we'll pick the data entity PurchaseOrder. Again, there is currently no relationship between Products, Suppliers and Purchase Orders in the app.

Now that we are done, we have 3 SAP System integrations in our project, all having one single data entity enabled for consumption in our app:



Creating new pages in the app to show the newly added data sources

Open the pages overview in SAP Build Apps by clicking on the name of the current page. This will bring you to an overview of all pages defined for your application. You'll see that besides the main page, we already have a page for SAP BTP Authentication. This page was automatically added when we enabled the BTP authentication.

Supplier list

Select ADD NEW PAGE and provide a name. As we intend to show a list of suppliers, we create a page with the name "Supplier list".

We are going to make use of a table that is available in the marketplace. Select the MARKETPLACE and search for basic table with data adapter. Select INSTALL.

Once installed, the UI component is visible in the INSTALLED tab, and you can drag and drop the component into the canvas.

Select the basic table with data adapter on this page. Configure the properties. Show a spinner while this component is loading data. We also need to pick the data entity fields we want to display. Not all fields are relevant for our use case, and besides that, keep in mind that on mobile devices we don't have that much screen real estate to work with. Besides that, the sandbox S/4HANA Cloud system does not contain useful data for all fields.

For our application, in the Field Configuration we pick SupplierName and VATRegistration. Change the display name to something shorter and more readable. 

We switch to the Properties to configure the behaviour of the table.

When we started developing our app, we've created a simple database with a limited set of rows containing sample data. We could quickly and easily query and store all data in our app. However, now that we have connected to an S/4HANA Cloud system, the chances are high that our queries result in lots of data. As you might have noticed when browsing the real data of the A_Supplier data source, the system contains 1490 rows. The amount of rows for Purchase Orders is much higher. This will take more time to load, store and process; especially on mobile devices. As we are only showing a limited set of information to the user, we don't have to load all this data at once. We could simply limit our query to a set that is visible to the user. This will greatly improve the responsiveness of the app. For this, we need to configure Pagination. However, we need to make some more preparations before we can actually do this.

Add page variables to manage the table

For the table, we want to keep track of the current page and how many pages there are in total. Take note that the initial value of CurrentPage is defined as 1.

We also need to know when to refresh the data in the table. More on this later.


Add buttons to navigate the pages

Drag and drop a container onto the page below the table, and two buttons and a text field into the container. 

We'll disable the left button to prevent the user from navigating to anything before page one. For this, we configure the Disabled property and bind it to the formula

IF(pageVars.CurrentPage>1, false, true)

For the right button, we'll disable it to prevent the user from navigating beyond the last page. For this, configure the Disabled property and bind it to the formula

IF(pageVars.CurrentPage<pageVars.TotalPageCount, false, true)

For the displaying the current and total amount of pages, we simply bind the Content property to the formula

"Page Number: "+pageVars.CurrentPage + " of "+pageVars.TotalPageCount

For each of the buttons, we'll need to add some logic to increase or decrease the current page number. Select the button and open the logic canvas.

For the left button, we set the page variable CurrentPage as follows:

pageVars.CurrentPage-1

Since we disable the button once CurrentPage is 1, we can keep this formula simple.

For the right button, we set the page variable CurrentPage as follows:

pageVars.CurrentPage+1

As we disable the button once we reach that maximum page count, we can keep this formula simple as well.

So now the user can only navigate to valid pages between 1 and the maximum amount available. But how do we know the total amount?


Getting the total amount of records (and pages)

How do we find out the total amount of records available in the OData service ? We can actually query this information from the OData service. Select the page we've created for Supplier List and open the logic canvas. Drag and drop DATA > Get record collection and VARIABLES > Set page variable. Connect the events as follows.

For this application I am going to use a fixed table size of 15 rows. A better implementation would be to figure out how much space we have on the screen and then fit the table accordingly. However, I am keeping things easy for now and will just use a fixed table size. This table will not fit on a mobile device. We'll adjust this in an upcoming blog post.

Use the following formula for setting the TotalPageCount:

INTEGER(outputs["Get record collection"].totalCount / 15) + 1

As you can see, the formula uses the output of "Get record collection" to find out the total amount of records. If we don't customise this, it will actually load ALL data. This is totally unnecessary overhead for this case. Also, loading way too much data will likely crash your mobile app ! To avoid all of this, we configure the property Paging. 

For the binding, select Object with properties, configured as below.

As the basis for pagination we will use pageIndex. We set the page size and page number to zero, as we don't need to load any data at this point. The only thing we are interested in now, is the total count, which we include in the query. 

Now that we have defined the current page, we can go back to configuring the table's properties and set the Pagination for the table.

In the custom object, we set the page size to 15 to keep things simple. For the Page number, we use the page variable CurrentPage. Assuming the total amount of records for this entity will not change, we don't include total count in the query. 

We have now defined the buttons and logic for navigating the pages. However, if you would run this, you will notice that the table does not get updated. This is because the table is only showing data queried upon the first render.

Refreshing the table

The table has a property called Refresh, which can be used to trigger a refresh of the table's contents. We will bind this property to the page variable refresh that we have created earlier.

We are going to toggle the page variable refresh when the user taps the previous and next buttons. For each of the buttons, adapt the logic as follows:

To toggle the value of refresh, we use the formula:

NOT(pageVars.refresh)


Purchase Orders

We follow the same steps as above to create another page showing Purchase Orders. 

For the data entity fields, I will be using PurchaseOrder, PurchaseOrderDate, PurchaseProcessingStatus and Supplier. I've shortened the display name of these fields, to keep the table header crisp and clean.

 

Page Navigation

Our application now has 3 pages. We can configure page navigation in the NAVIGATION tab. For each page we can configure an icon and the tab name.



Summary – use case E

In this use case we have used the SAP Business Accelerator Hub site to identify APIs available on our S/4HANA Cloud 'sandbox' ERP system. We've picked an OData V2 and an OData V4 data source and created BTP Destinations to access these destinations in our cloud development environment. We have then added these data sources in SAP Build Apps and selected the data entities to be used in our application.

We have add two pages to display selected data properties in a table and implemented pagination, as the amount of data stored in the cloud ERP system can be significant and we don't need all this data in the app. We also created a query to find out the total amount of records in the system that can be retrieved. And finally, we have defined the application's page navigation.

What's next

In the next blog post, we will continue on the connectivity topic and explore how we can use relationships between data entities.

entry.title: Re: Extending the ABAP CDS extractor
entry.content: After extending this custom field will show in Datasphere ?

entry.title: Solman7.2 SAPGUIからTr-cd実行時の通信プロトコル(LMDB、solman_setup)
entry.content:
Solman7.2のAPAPから、SAPGUIでLMDBを実行するとブラウザが起動され、URLが以下の通りとなります。

SAPGUIからsolman_setupを実行すると、以下のURLになります。

LMDB、solman_setupともに利用されている通信プロトコルはHTTPです。
これをHTTPSに変更することは可能でしょうか。

セキュリティ強化のため、LMDBやsolman_setup実行後に実行されるURLはHTTPではなくHTTPSに変更したいと考えております。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solman7.2 SAPGUIからTr-cd実行時の通信プロトコル(LMDB、solman_setup)
entry.content:
1.t-code:SMICM->Go to serviceに、HTTPSのプロトコルを有効化していただき、ホストとポートの情報をご入力ください。
2.t-code:solman_setup infrastructure preparation 2.1 Define HTTP Connectivityの所に、HTTPSのURLを選定してください。
3.t-code:SICF
-Service Name:LMDB_WDA_EXPL_OIF
-Service Name:wd_sise_main_app
=>Logon Data->Security Requirement->SSLをご選定ください。

ケースの中の画面キャプチャをご参照ください。

entry.title: A Culinary Journey Through New York City
entry.content:
New York City is a paradise for food lovers, offering an unparalleled diversity of culinary experiences. Whether you're a local or a visitor, there are some iconic eats you simply cannot miss. Here's a curated guide to some of the best food spots in NYC, from high-end delis to budget-friendly food trucks.

Katz's Delicatessen

You can't leave NYC without trying Katz's Delicatessen. Famous for its pastrami sandwiches, this place serves up what many consider the best pastrami sandwich in history. It's a bit pricey at $30, but the portion is generous, and the flavor is unforgettable. Check it out on Google Maps.

Shake Shack and Best Burger

When it comes to unique and high-quality fast food, Shake Shack is ten steps above the rest. Known for its delicious burgers, shakes, and fries, Shake Shack offers a gourmet fast food experience that you won't forget. Find it here.

but although I haven't tried it yet, reviews and word of mouth suggest this place has the best burger in NYC:

  • Highly recommended burger spot

Bagels and Lox

For a classic NYC breakfast, head to the top bagel shops. While you can splurge on bagels with lox, it's worth every penny. These bagels are ubiquitous in the city, but some shops stand out for their exceptional quality. Here's a great place to start.

Chinatown's Culinary Gems

Chinatown offers some of the best and most affordable dining experiences in NYC. Two top restaurants to try for my perspective are:

  • First restaurant
  • Second restaurant

If you're looking for a budget-friendly option, this place is excellent:

  • Budget-friendly spot

For those are even shorter with budget, this is a great choice:

  • Very affordable option

Cheesecake in NYC

Heading north, you'll find some of the best cheesecakes in the city. The top spot for cheesecake is here, with a close second being this location.

Best Food Stall

For an iconic NYC street food experience, there's a food stall that's considered the best in the city. Despite the 30-40 minute wait, it's worth it, and for just $10, you'll leave feeling super full. Check it out.
I also made a blog about it here in the SAP Community.

Affordable Pizza

NYC is known for its dollar slices, but for the best cheap pizza, this spot stands out:

  • Best cheap pizza

I love art and this slice is perfect before or after the MoMa. If you are passionate of TV series round the corner there is the reference bar from How I Met Your Mother.


Financial District Food Trucks

The Financial District is home to some great food trucks. Usually at lunch a lot of people used to eat from a food truck. I worked for a while here and I often ate at an:

  • Indian food truck 

And my favorite is an excellent falafel truck nearby that's worth seeking out but it's not on the maps. It is in the Zuccotti Park check it out.

Embark on this culinary adventure and experience the diverse flavors that make New York City a food lover's dream. Enjoy!

entry.title: Re: how to control variable offset range [Analysis for Mi...

Thanks your advise, you are right!

i tried your advise it could be completed by my request.

entry.title: Re: UI adapt using SAP BAS

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Bom dia @luize_boyen 

por gentileza, referente ao tópico NF-e Technical 2023.004 v1.10-SEFAZ:

- poderiam me informar qual a nota SAP que cria a tag XML  <IndDeduzDeson>?

Pois o campo já está habilitado na tela, mas não está saindo esta tag no XML ....

Grato

#NF-e Technical 2023.004 v1.10

#<IndDeduzDeson>

 

 

 

João Gaia

entry.title: /usr/sapの使用量増加について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。

対象システムの/usr/sapファイルシステムの使用容量が増加してきており、対応が必要です。
急激な増加ではなく、緩やかに増加していますが、増加原因は特定できておりません。

そのため、使用容量の増加原因および空き容量を増加させる方法をご教示ください。


以上、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: /usr/sapの使用量増加について
entry.content:
システム使用により、/usr/sapファイルシステムの使用容量が緩やかに増加することは予想できる正常現象だと認識いたします。

もし詳細確認必要な場合、お手数ですが、これから毎月/usr/sap/<SID>配下各フォルダ使用容量の変化を記録、増加量例えば
TOP 3のフォルダを特定することで、詳細状況が分かります。例えば、ログ/usr/sap/<SID>/DVEBMGS<nr>/logフォルダが
一番増加量高いなら、不要なログをOSから削除することで空き容量増加可能です。

Upon usage, /usr/sap file system disk size slow increase is a foreseeable normal situation.

In case there is need to further locate what caused the increase, please keep monitor and record every month 
to see which folders under path /usr/sap/<SID> are e.g. top 3 with regard to disk size increase.

For example, if /usr/sap/<SID>/DVEBMGS<nr>/log folder is the top 1 folder that increased in disk size, then
please consider to delete the old logs that are no longer needed.

entry.title: Re: Login Page in SAP build apps
entry.content: Hi Marc! Does any within SAP BTP have this ability create a user to login and logout? For example work email

entry.title: Re: Render and Sign PDF Document In a UI5 Application With BTP Form Service by Adobe
entry.content:
Dear All, 

If we download the PDF, it will look like the following 

Best regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Re: Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Great news from SAP Sappire 2024. SAP Business AI Innovations and Collaborations with Partners including Google Cloud, Meta, Microsoft, Mistral AI and NVIDIA Ignite Ingenuity.

The leading open-source models LLaMa 3-70b and Mixtral are now available in SAP Generative AI Hub. Please check the full available models here: 3437766 - Availability of Generative AI Models. So as thumb of rule, it is recommended to use these default open-source models in SAP Generative AI Hub if you opt-in to embrace the open-source LLMs. You may deploy and run the needed open-source LLMs/LMMs through Bring-Your-Own-Model approach described in this blog post only if LLaMa 3-70b and Mixtral are not able to accommodate your use case, such vision capability etc.

entry.title: In sap b one 9.3 When copying from goods issue in goods receipt form, Gr form gets stuck
entry.content: Why I want to know ?

entry.title: Re: SU01 dump error 523 am when updating a user
entry.content: look at what you provided, are you serious?

entry.title: Re: About Using SAP Companion for Ariba Guided Buying
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

SAP Companion records the context to two places, one is on the overall Guided Tour and one is on each step of the Guided Tour.

If you open the Element tab of each step of the Guided Tour, you will be able to see the context assigned to that step:

 If you then check the context values on the overall Guided Tour, are all the step context values also available on the overall Guided Tour?

 If some of the context values on the individual steps are missing, I suspect that that is the issue.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now Information Sessions (European Friendly Times)
entry.content:
Hi Ananovaes,

Yes, I have recordings of most sessions and many of those recordings can be accessed from this page.

Some of the newer recordings are available but not from the page, mentioned above, so you will need to contact me directly for access to those recordings, at this time.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Skipping of Vendor Account Number during automatic generation
entry.content: Thank you, It helps

entry.title: Re: After Extending Standard Odata Service strings are missing in Annotation meta data
entry.content: any solution

entry.title: When migrating sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app.The following warning
entry.content:
Hello.I want to export data of "Cutomer : Ctry-Spec.Enh." tab in customer master (Company Codes.)However, if I output master data by Export Master Data-Business Partners app, those data is not exported,
and I can't find CDS view that have those data.Cannot I export   "Cutomer : Ctry-Spec.Enh." tab data?
Plaese help.

entry.title: Re: Combining SAP Fiori Freestyle and List Report Pages i...
entry.content:
Hi,

I am assuming you are talking about Fiori elements OData V4. What is allowed is to have a separate tab and then define your custom view there see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/eb37203f2b884b5097c3c858107cae1f for more details. This means there is no way to remove the default table that shows up in LR, but you could always define additional custom views that show up in extra tabs in the List Report.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center - Preparing Transport Request from Source tenant
entry.content:
Please look into the Implementation Design Principle - link

We will soon arrange a webinar to get the common doubts answered on configurations. Dates will be communicated via the SAP SuccessFactors IDP newsletter.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to Career Corner

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Landscape Architecture & Life-cycle Management
entry.content:
Hi Matthew,

Thanks for the information.

Can you share information on what is the available storage on public SAC and options to have additional storage for importing data and planning.

Thanks,

entry.title: How to show total at the end of SAC tables created by linking two BW Live Models
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a SAC table , sourced from 2 live models linked via the common dimensions between them.

Table Columns :- Have measures (yellow coming from 1st Live model )

                                            (Orange coming from 2nd Live model)

                                            (Blue are the calculated measures within the story)

There are 3 dimensions listed here , we want to see Total in the end by Planting (i.e. the first dimension)

When we hover the mouse on the Planting dimension header, the total option is greyed out (this behaviour is true for the other 2 dimension listed in the table below).

Is there a way we can show Total in the bottom?

Regards,

Zeenat S

entry.title: Re: ATP check at Sales Contract
entry.content:
Hi Priya,

I came across similar situation to have availabiity check to reserve stock for contracts. I activated the check for Cotnactact item, created sales order with refernce to contact, then develiry etc. In MD04, all were shown as your requirmeent. 

Regards

Rajendra

entry.title: DIEN or Service masters?
entry.content:
Hi!

We already use the material DIEN (ZDIEN for purchasing) to process services.
We are now planning to start using PM orders.
What are the risks if we continue to use DIEN instead of the service masters?
What is the best practice?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Management of Change - tables where answers to qu...
entry.content:
Step 1 : I_ChgMgmtRequest (/iam/d_i_root)

, we will the change request ID and get the UUID.

 

Step2 : I_ChgMgmtActivity(/iam/d_act_root): Pass the UUID.

 

Step3 : Pass the Activity template (RSK, PST-1 etc in the field act_template(table) ChgMgmtActyTemplate(CDS view).

Step4 : Pass the activity UUID into I_ChgMgmtActyDescription and get the code subgroup.

Step 5 : 

pass it to /IAM/C_CODE_T for code text

/IAM/C_CODEGR_T for Code group text.

 

For step 3 we need to take the help from technical team since its a CDS view.

Regards

Pramod K.B

entry.title: How to fetch Current User's Email Address in BTP RAP Method
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to fetch the Current User's Email Address in my BTP RAP Method but the Class "cl_abap_context_info" don't have any method to fetch the same.

Please help hot to get the Email Address of the user..

Thanks,

BTP Learner

entry.title: SIチェック、Readness Check、ATC分析について
entry.content:
１．Readiness checkを実施しないことでどういった影響が出ますでしょうか。
２．SIチェック、ATC分析、Readiness Checkは、バージョンアップ後の新サーバ(S/4HANA2023)で実施しても問題ありませんでしょうか。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SIチェック、Readness Check、ATC分析について
entry.content:
＞１．Readiness checkを実施しないことでどういった影響が出ますでしょうか。
→アップグレードの前に、プロジェクトに支援を提供するものですので、お客様の需要に応じていただければよいです。
実施しなくても影響がございません。

＞２．SIチェック、ATC分析、Readiness Checkは、バージョンアップ後の新サーバ(S/4HANA2023)で実施しても問題ありませんでしょうか。
→バージョンアップ前のシステムで実施する必要がございます。
詳細につきまして、以下のKBAをご参照ください。
3059197 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades 
=>You are either considering or planning an upgrade of an existing SAP S/4HANA system to a new product version. As a result, you want to analyze your existing SAP S/4HANA system with the SAP Readiness Check tool for SAP S/4HANA upgrades, to help scope and plan your project.
SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades supports SAP S/4HANA 1511 or higher.

entry.title: How to update multiple PR line items using a standard API
entry.content:
Hello,

        We are using a standard PR API for creation of purchase requisition with multiple line items using AIS (Azure integration service). Now our issue is when we are trying use a patch call to update multiple line items of the PR (ex change of quantity of line item 10, 20, 30....), the 1st line is getting updated, but  when AIS is trying to update 2nd line item getting an error- "User XXX cloud connector, SBP already processing purchase Requisition XXXXX".

Is it not possible to update the multiple line items of a PR via single update patch call of the PR requisition.

Please let me know the possible way.

Link to standard API: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001/overview

 

Regards

Venu

entry.title: DIEN or Service masters?
entry.content:
Hi!

We already use the material DIEN (ZDIEN for purchasing) to process services.
We are now planning to start using PM orders.
What are the risks if we continue to use DIEN instead of the service masters?
What is the best practice?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere JDBC, ODBC, or other method for readin...
entry.content:
Hello,

as far as I'm aware there are two ways to write Data to Datasphere:

  1. Integrating Data via Database Users/Open SQL Schemas
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/3de55a78a4614deda589633baea28645.html?locale=en-US
  2. Unsing an HDI Container
    This is case when the Data is written from a SAP BAP(Business Application Studio)
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/1aec7ca95af24208a61c1a444b249d95.html?locale=en-US

However I would rather use another approach using the SAP "Standard" and read the data instead of pushing(write) it into the Datasphere.
There are a LOT of supported Connecionts, just search for your's: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/1aec7ca95af24208a61c1a444b249d95.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Hybris 2211 : SmartEdit date picker prefilled with th...
entry.content: Please check if customisation to DateTimePickerComponent.ts —> handleDatePickerChange could help. Plan to add logic to OOTB so that optional date/time picker field in OOTB wouldn’t be automatically filled.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI History not getting saved
entry.content:
Its help.

Thanks.

entry.title: Want to delete DRAFT entries in bulk mode
entry.content:
I want to delete the DRAFT from year 2019. How can I delete in bulk mode?

Or can run a query to delete the DRAFT??

I create the following query. when I run query by DocNum, it works But if i add posting date selection, it gives error "1). [Microsoft][ODBC Driver 13 for SQL Server][SQL Server]The conversion of a varchar data type to a datetime data type resulted in an out-of-range value. 'User-Defined Values' (CSHS)" 

What should I do, to run the query by date selection option.

 

DELETE FROM

ODRF
WHERE
--DocNum = '20129';
DocDate = [%0] and DocDate = [%1] ;

entry.title: Looping Process Call and Poll Enrich to read multiple files from the SFTP Server.
entry.content:
Hi, I am using Looping Process Call and Poll Enrich to read multiple files from the SFTP Server. 
In the SFTP adapter, in Post-Processing , i have selected Keep File and Mark as Processed in Idempotent Repository because if i choose Keep file and Process Again then it is reading only one file and the loop is running infinitely. Also, I can't choose Move file and Delete file because of restrictions.

My question is if the file is read and at some point in my iFlow if i get any error then i have to reprocess that file. But due to using "Keep File and Mark as Processed in Idempotent Repository", I am not able to read the file again.

How can i solve this issue?
Is there any where i can mark that file as unprocessed in the Idempotent Repository?
or any other solution.

Regards,
Abhinav

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration

entry.title: Re: Can you remove Onboarding business process error mess...
entry.content: 1. Enable BPE in UI

entry.title: Re: Custom Code Migration app - Known Problems & Solutions

Hi Olga,

I found out that the user had some authorizations missing.

The last authorization object I added was:

S_ADMI_FCD / SCMD -> Read ABAP Call Monitor Data

Kind Regards
Jens

entry.title: Re: How to implement Onboarding 2.0 without Employee Central?
entry.content: Hi @Bilal1 Sure you can

entry.title: I have a 3 party tool that need read access to tables in SAP BW Hana DB - do i need a license?
entry.content:
Hi

We are going to use SAC planning going forward. We are going to save the data in an aDSO. We have a customer that also have a 3 party tool that want to read from this specific aDSO but from the database using the active table of the aDSO. we are not going to transfer the data, just read access.

so when the data is saved into the aDSO and activated, the data will be shown in the 3 party tools when they run the reports there.

We have a plan for this, but the question is of this demands some kind of license. Anyone knows that?

The total volume of the data including orders ,consignments and invoices are ZIPCODE.

Appreciate your quick response.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: The recommendation/best practices to upload of Orders...
entry.content:
1. According to your description, so far you have not started to do the import via impex, here is the official help doc about impex, suggest you to go through this doc first.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/aa417173fe4a4ba5a473c93eb730a417/1b6dd3451fc04c3aa8e95937e9ef2471.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/aa417173fe4a4ba5a473c93eb730a417/8bee24e986691014b97bcd2c7e6ff732.html?locale=en-US

2 please try to avoid the other running cronjob when doing import via impex. as multiple cronjob running on the same time could cause performance issue

Hemanth.B

entry.title: Re: Does an MRP run delete or cancel planned orders if th...
entry.content:
Hello @PMoyo 

MRP will delete planned orders if they are not needed anymore and if they are not fixed.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to handle Purchase Orders and Sales Orders with Old Material Numbers?
entry.content:
We are in the process of replacing around 9000 Materials with New Material Codes (This is done to activate Automatic Batch Split Valuation). Old Material Numbers will be maintained in MARA-BISMT. Stock will be moved to new material code. I have a few questions regarding this.

1. Should existing Purchase Orders and Sales Orders be closed before I do this activity? Or is there a way to use the new material codes to do goods receipt for existing POs and deliveries for existing SOs?

2. How do I handle sales return of older sales orders?

entry.title: Wireframe libraries / tools for MDK apps
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am interested in experimenting with wireframing for MDK applications, specifically for iOS devices. Currently, I can access the Figma library for the BTP SDK for iOS Native SDK(https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-ios/article/design-kit-24-4/) , but I'm unable to find similar resources for MDK SDK controls. Given that MDK utilizes the BTP SDK for iOS to generate controls, yet not all SDK controls are available in MDK, what would you recommend as the best approach to wireframing for MDK apps where there are limited controls and properties available?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Is it possible to combine multiple Fiori floor plans to create a single application
entry.content:
Hi all ,
     In my case, I want to develop an application with custom Fiori UI and also List and object page as well, need to navigate between multiple paged so , I thought of combining both basic and List report floor plan of Fiori UI.
    Using List report floor plan will increase my productivity and Basic Floor plan will increase flexibility.

    Is it possible to combine those floorplans to develop a single application?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Combining SAP Fiori Freestyle and List Report Pages i...
entry.content: Thank you @junwu, How to achieve that ?

entry.title: Re: Exposing a SOAP service in BTP, ABAP
entry.content:
Hello Felix,

Here is an overview of the steps to help you out:

Creating a Communication Scenario

  1. You need to create a communication scenario as described in Defining a Communication Scenario Including Authorization Values. This guide will help you define communication scenarios, which can be used to access business services using a technical communication user.

Generating Provider Proxies From WSDL Files

  1. Based on the WSDL file of the service you want to provide, create an SPRV as described in Creating SOAP Service Providers.
  2. Activate the SPRV.
  3. Add the generated inbound service to the relevant communication scenario.
  4. Publish the communication scenario locally to make it available for the administrator in SAP Fiori launchpad.

Add implementation logic to generated class

  1. The SPRV generates an implementing class of the service you want to provide. To provide the functionality of your service, add the required application logic to the generated implementing class. Afterwards, activate the implementing class.

Configure communication arrangement based on communication scenario

  1. Based on the communication scenario, the administrator can create a communication system, inbound user, and communication arrangement, to make the service available for consumption. For more information, see Communication Management.

All of this should also be described in Generate Provider Proxies From WSDL Files.

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Production order confirmation via custom design
entry.content:
Hi 

it sounds like mixing in Master data ... 

> check in the linerouting at last operation : Control Key .. maybe you have here also "do the Posting - 101" 

> also check the stuff with: Serialnumber > create Equipment..  

Robert

entry.title: Re: The current widget is already exporting, or there are...
entry.content:
As far as we noticed, the problem occurs on the first pages in the Story, and Excel Export scripts work correctly on the following pages. So we temporarily created a new blank page and hid it. This is how the script works.

However, there is something to pay attention to: It adds a Version column to the table of the relevant page and resets the Measure filter in the table.

entry.title: Collaborate on your SAP Build Code project with your teammates!
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are excited to launch another much-awaited feature in SAP Build Code - you can now collaborate on any Build Code project with your colleagues with ease.

SAP Build Code adheres to Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) best practices. This means that you can connect any SAP Build Code project easily to a source control system for version management. The SAP Build Code development environment comes with a simplified Git panel that lets you do exactly that. You can read more about it here.

Once the project is in a source control repository, you can easily add teammates to your project from the SAP Build Lobby and start collaborating with them.

Let’s see an example:

  1. Create your project in SAP Build Code.

2. Write your application code (with the help of Joule, or with the graphical modelers, or even manually). Here, I have created three data entities, some sample data, OData services, and a SAP Fiori elements UI application. 

3. Next, go to your source control system and create a new repository. In this example, I use Github, but you can use any git-based source control.

4. Copy the repo URL. We will use this in the next step.

5. Open the simplified Git panel, click on Add Remote Repository button and add the URL of the git repo.

6. Once connected, you can either check in your code to the main branch or create a new branch. Next, click on Commit and Sync button to check in your code.

7. Now, return to the SAP Build Lobby, locate your project, and click on Options (…) and Manage Members.

8. You can now add your teammates with either a Developer or an Administrator access.

Note: if your project is not yet shared with a source control repository, you will get this message:

9. Next, go to your Git repository and add your colleague as a collaborator.

And that is all!

Next, let’s see what happens when your colleague tries to access the shared project

 1. The colleague logs into the SAP Build Lobby and can see the shared project in his/her list.

2. When s/he clicks on the project, s/he will be asked to choose a dev space. They can leave the recommended dev space as-is and click Select.

3. The project is cloned to the colleague’s dev space. Since the Git repo is private, s/he will be prompted for credentials.

4. Once the git repo is cloned, your teammate can now access the project and work on it.

We hope that this new feature simplifies your experience of collaboration across SAP Build Code projects. You can read more about it here.

Until next time, happy coding!

entry.title: 2 BO groups of conflicting folder permissions
entry.content:
Hi All,

   For SAP BO Webi, if a user is a member of two different groups, and each group has been assigned different rights to the same folder. For example, user is assigned to group 1 which has Full Control to folder A. Additionally, user is assigned to group 2 which only has View On Demand (lesser privilege, eg: cannot edit the report) access to folder A. What access rights will eventually take effect for the user to folder A?

Thanks!

entry.content:
Hi, Marek

We have the same issue... Do you find the solution? It would be very convenient if you could share your experience. Thanks!!

 

Carme

entry.title: Re: Screen Number different in Abscence Screen
entry.content: Did you able to figure out what's the problem and the solution for it? We faced the same situation

entry.title: Integration between Recruiting and a Corporate Website - Job Postings
entry.content:
Hi Team.

I am trying to build an integration between SF Recruiting & a corporate website. I can find all of the data points I need, but I don't know on which data points to filter to only receive the active job postings on the external career website.

Does anyone have the answer to this?

entry.title: Re: Even more Flexibility in Adaptation using Screen Personas Scripting with Mobile RF Devices in Wa
entry.content:
Hi @mhassau,

I have to admit that I am not an expert in JavaScript and web security. Other colleagues might be better experts.
I assume this is connected to your attempt to access resources from cross origin. In the example provided within this blog we stay on the same server. Without knowing the exact error and the response headers in your case it is hard to tell what exactly is going on. A typical solution is to use some kind of a reverse proxy like SAP WebDispatcher to bring required resources under the same origin.

Best regards, Tobias

entry.title: Re: Robosapiens and SAPGUI Library in Robot Framework: At...
entry.content:
Hello @AutomationTester,

it seems that the network settings of your connection are set to low speed connection. if you use the Low Speed Connection, problems can occur in SAP GUI Scripting, because the field names are not available in full, only as number in brackets. Set the network settings to High Speed Connection and it should work.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: Write to a text file from within script?
entry.content:
Hi,

I think I have never done this myself within a script.

Have you thought about building a dataflow for it? It should give you the same result.

I.e: Use a Row_Generator that creates one row. Add a Query and add some target columns such as date, config etc. Then Map these fields with the functions from your last post.

Afterwards write into an output .txt file of which the filename is generic and consists of the jobname and runtime or similar.

You could then also use this dataflow generically in all of your jobs.

Julian

entry.title: SAP Datasphere connection with SAP ECC and SAP CRM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to build a data lake architecture in SAP Datasphere. The source systems will be SAP ECC 6.0 EHP 7 and SAP CRM ABAP 7.0 (EHP 1). Are these version of the source systems compatible with Datasphere and what should be the best way to ingest data from these sources?

Any help is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Different number appears instead of user name in Messages/Alerts Overview
entry.content:
Hi, 

Different number appears instead of user name in Messages/Alerts Overview. See attached. Any idea?

entry.title: Re: Do changing the usage of routing after production ord...
entry.content:
Hello kraghavanbindhu ,

I tested this scenario in SAP ECC, as per my testing, I have not found any errors while prod.  order execution. Errors will be generated when you try to do read PP master data to update changed routing in Prod. order. 

Let me give steps here from my end for testing this scenario.

Step 1 --> Create Prod. Order with Routing for which Usage is 3 

Step 2 --> Change Routing Usage 3 to 1 

Step 3 -->   You can try for Read PP Master Data to update changes in prod. order, you will notice error here also proceed with release of order and perform all steps till TECO.

entry.title: SAP Sapphire 2024 Day 1 is in the books: It's all about the Future of AI and Cloud Innovation
entry.content:
AI Where? Everywhere!

SAP is putting AI into every corner of its cloud portfolio. Think AI-driven insights in SuccessFactors and predictive tools in Sales Cloud. It’s all about smarter, faster business processes​ (Dutch IT Channel)​.

Big-Time Partnerships

As we have seen with the SAP Datasphere partnerships with Databricks, Google, Colibra and the likes. SAP cannot win the game on its own. Therefore also in the AI space, SAP is teaming up with tech giants to boost its AI game:

  • Google Cloud: Integrating SAP Joule with Google Cloud’s Gemini models for better supply chain management​ (ERP Today)​.
  • Meta: Using Meta’s Llama 3 in SuccessFactors and Analytics Cloud​ (TechTarget)​.
  • Mistral AI: Adding Mistral's large language models to SAP AI Core​ (TechTarget)​.
  • NVIDIA: Enhancing AI assistants and creating digital twins for industrial apps​ (TechTarget)​.

In my view, NVIDIA is the game changer (kitty down 😀) here.

AI Assistants and Ethical AI

Joule, SAP’s AI assistant, is now in more apps like S/4HANA Cloud and Integration Suite. Plus, SAP is committed to ethical AI, following UNESCO’s guidelines​ (Dutch IT Channel)​​ (ERP Today)​. As listed yesterday in my blog on hot AI sessions, its all about reliable and ethical appropriate models. See the sessions from Dr. Bettina Laugwitz for more on the topic.

New AI Features

SAP unveiled generative AI in its Business Technology Platform, using models from AWS and Meta. This includes integrating with Microsoft 365’s Copilot for deeper insights​ (TechTarget)​.

Dual Focus: Cloud and AI

SAP Sapphire 2024 focused on both cloud migration and AI innovation, showing real-world benefits like increased productivity with the Joule AI assistant​ (TechTarget)​.

Partner Ecosystem and Sustainability

SAP stressed the importance of partners in AI and cloud transitions, with new tools to help businesses find the right expertise. They also introduced features in the Sustainability Control Tower and Footprint Management to help companies track their sustainability efforts​ (TechTarget)​.

Wrapping Up

SAP Sapphire 2024 was all about pushing boundaries with AI and cloud tech. These advancements are set to make businesses more agile and innovative, crucial for staying competitive.

SAP is playing catch up, but is in it to win it!

Looking forward to day 2!

entry.title: Re: Distribution of Article Hierarchy via IDOCS
entry.content: But, this T Codes only allow to download the Activated one. How to download the Planned one.

entry.title: SAP AI Core Azure Blob storage SAS token RESPONSE 403 AuthenticationFailed
entry.content:
I am trying to connect our Azure Blob Storage to SAP AI Core using a SAS token.

sp=racwdlme&st=2024-06-03T14:15:54Z&se=2025-06-02T22:15:54Z&spr=https&sv=2022-11-02&sr=d&sig=xxxx%3D&sdd=3

The SAS token works fine via the browser. 

The Object Store Secret looks like the following: 

{
"CONTAINER_URI": "https://xxx.blob.core.windows.net/<container>",
"STORAGE_ACCESS_KEY": "sp=racwdlme&st=2024-06-03T14:15:54Z&se=2025-06-02T22:15:54Z&spr=https&sv=2022-11-02&sr=d&sig=xxxx%3D&sdd=3"
}

with path prefix aaa/bbb/ccc

But when trying to copy the files in the execution via SAP AI Core I always get the following error:

RESPONSE 403: 403 Server failed to authenticate the request. Make sure the value of Authorization header is formed correctly including the signature. ERROR CODE: AuthenticationFailed

level=error msg="executor error: artifact xxx failed to load: unable to download blob aaa/bbb/ccc/ddd/eee/data/jan: HEAD https://xxx.blob.core.windows.net/<container>/aaa/bbb/ccc/ddd/eee/data/jan\n--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
RESPONSE 403: 403 Server failed to authenticate the request. Make sure the value of Authorization header is formed correctly including the signature.
ERROR CODE: AuthenticationFailed

Any idea what might be the reason?
The SAS token signature is provided with '%3D' at the end instead of '=' - right?
Actually, I tried both.

entry.title: Re: Third-party cookies deprecation for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content: OOTB, SAP Commerce Cloud doesn't rely on 3rd party cookies for any functionality. But I guess that's not only what you're asking?

entry.title: Re: period closing has not yet taken placeMessage No. CK763
entry.content:
Hello Aswanth,

Kindly check MMPV transaction for period closure or read SAP note 2175035 for more details of this error.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Connectivity With S/4 HANA System & SAP Analytics Cloud : Technical Configura
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I execute the "Connect and Configure the Data Provisioning Agent" when may system's are in the SAP RISE Private Cloud, please ? I would like to create a new connection between S/4HANA an Datasphare but when I select this option I can see this adverstiment "

“There is no registered adapter available for this connection type. Please register the ABAPAdapter adapter to a connected Data Provisioning Agent if you want to use remote tables via Data Provisioning Agent.”

Thanks an regards

Francesc S.

entry.title: Information about an APP
entry.content:
Dear team,

For compliance Issues, we need to install an external APP called AIDE (Advanced Intrusion Detection Environment ). It's a file and directory integrity checker. We need to know if this is compatible with our SAP enviroments and if it's safe to install. Could you give us some information?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Information about an APP
entry.content:
Hi Customer,

 

SAP doesn't specifically recommend or disapprove the use of AIDE , or any other host-based intrusion detection system.

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content: I created System DSN as CR Oracle Cilent 7.1.6 and CR Oracle Wire Protocol ODBC Driver 8.0.2. They connects very fast but this time I can not see neither tables nor views.

entry.title: Re: How to extract a report of blocked 101 mov with the P...
entry.content:
Hi,

Goto ME2N and in dynamic selection select Good receipt.

In the processing of production and process orders, the indicator specifies whether a goods receipt is allowed and expected for the order item.

If the indicator is set, the order item is relevant to inventory management. The indicator is set during the creation of the order if the order is settled in respect of a material or a sales order item.

Regards

entry.title: S4HC Adding Logic to Custom Business Objects
entry.content:
I've been following along with the tutorial on Implement Logic for a Custom Business Object 

In there they say to implement additional logic for After Modification and Before Save  - and as per the SAP Help

But is there some trick to getting this code to execute on the create event when using the application ?.  My published application has the actioned as actions links on the menu bar instead that I need to click on.  I want to create a record and for it to automatically trigger them on those events and I don't want those 2 to appear on the menu bar.

entry.title: Re: DIEN or Service masters?
entry.content:
Hi,

The DIEN material type in the SD module, In Plant Maintenance if you're using DIEN material type the process will be similar to PM02, where there is no service entry sheet, and the goods receipt (GR) is processed directly.

You can also refer to this link DIEN material type in PM order 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Combining SAP Fiori Freestyle and List Report Pages i...
entry.content: Hi...No, if you need a welcome page with multiple tiles that then redirect to LR page, this welcome page has to be a complete custom page! This is nothing that can be built into the standard fe LR template.

entry.title: Re: Process Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hello CharlesNwankwo ,

When you perform confirmation, I am considering that process order is posting GR along with operations confirmation in your system.so order will show status as CNF DLV. now user have cancelled confirmation so in this case ideally 102 movement has to be posted automatically to revert GR movement along with reverting operations confirmation.

check status of order and check material documents of the order so that you will get idea on this topic.

entry.title: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
This discussion thread is for you to ask your questions and discuss issues if you are participating in the June 2024 developer challenge. The topic is "Multi-model processing with SAP HANA and Python in SAP Business Application Studio."

Please use separate discussions created for the submission of your solutions. Keep this thread for your questions only.

entry.title: CDS Query: Filter on dimensions not showing
entry.content:
Hi Fellow Experts,

I'm trying to create a CDS consumption query based on standard billing CDS (I_BillingDocExtdItem) with additional association to my custom material master CDS view for material master info.

However, when I tried to open the CDS query in AfO (Analysis for Office), I'm unable to filter with the values for each of the dimensions selected in the query.

Appreciate if anyone can point out what did i missed in my CDS and query.

Analysis for Office, no available members when trying to apply filter

 

CDS Query

Source CDS

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Want to delete DRAFT entries in bulk mode
entry.content:
Hi labindia123,

Refer to SAP Note 3450729 for the same.

The new functionality is provided in SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2405.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support
